_comment: Runs via `npx`, which resolves @ansible/ansible-mcp-server from the npm
cache/registry — no OS-specific path, so this works on Linux and macOS.
Requires Node >= 24 on PATH (the package's `engines` constraint); the lab
box gets it from the dev role's `dev_install_node` gate.
Until v26.5.0 the package shipped a broken `bin` (ESM bundle, threw on
Node >= 22), which forced a hardcoded `node .../dist/cli.cjs` workaround
here; upstream now points `bin` at the CJS build, so plain `npx` is fine.
